examples: They don't deform easily; they tend to be more brittle.
They were quite brittle and shattered very easily if they were dropped.
You've already known that ice is brittle, and if you hit it with a hammer, it will shatter like glass.
The goal: a drug against osteoporosis, the brittle-bone disease that afflicts 25 million older Americans, mostly women.
But far worse, it melted at high temperatures and became brittle at low ones.
